mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is falling or already depressed, equity discount rates ease and duration-sensitive large-cap cash flows reprice higher, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day forward SPX returns are not positive on average when FEDFUNDS is declining over the prior 3 months, or if the sign flips and remains negative in a rolling 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A CPIAUCSL acceleration above the prior 6-month trend implies inflation pressure that raises expected policy rates and compresses equity multiples, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized inflation rises above its 12-month moving average
failure_condition: Reject if triggered CPIAUCSL inflation shocks are followed by positive 20-day SPX returns in more than 55% of cases or if average post-trigger returns are non-negative.

mechanism_narrative: A PAYEMS downturn paired with a rising UNRATE signals labor market deterioration that weakens consumer income and earnings expectations, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next month.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS falls and UNRATE rises over the same 2-month window
failure_condition: Reject if the joint labor-deterioration condition does not outperform either proxy alone, or if triggered instances produce positive 20-day SPX returns in more than 50% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in RSAFS indicates stronger retail demand and revenue momentum, which supports near-term earnings revisions and lifts S&P 500 returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Reject if rising RSAFS does not coincide with positive 5-day SPX returns on average, or if the short-horizon sign remains negative for any 1-year subperiod.

mechanism_narrative: When INDPRO is rising faster than GDP proxy demand signals, it indicates cyclical production momentum and inventory rebuilding that supports earnings breadth, yielding positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if combined production-growth conditions fail to produce positive 20-day SPX returns in a walk-forward test, or if INDPRO relative to GDPC1 has no incremental explanatory power.

mechanism_narrative: If UNRATE rises by at least 0.3 percentage points over three months, recession risk becomes visible to equity traders and forward returns turn negative over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Reject if unemployment-rise triggers are followed by non-negative 60-day SPX returns on average, or if the trigger loses predictive sign consistency across two consecutive rolling years.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous rise in HOUST and RSAFS signals broadening end-demand and housing-linked spending, which improves cyclical earnings expectations and produces positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint HOUST-RSAFS signal is not stronger than each series alone, or if positive co-moves fail to precede positive 20-day SPX returns in at least 55% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: In a tightening cycle, a rising FEDFUNDS rate combined with stable or falling CPIAUCSL indicates real rate pressure rather than benign disinflation, which depresses equity valuation and lowers S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if tightening episodes with flat or falling CPIAUCSL do not precede negative 20-day SPX returns, or if the interaction term has no sign consistency in rolling out-of-sample tests.
